R.label: Receipt Delivery Channel
R.description: Channel used to deliver the receipt to the affected party.

F.label: Funding Source
F.description: Entity or mechanism funding the verifier.

S.label: Scope Authority
S.description: Entity defining what the verifier can inspect.

X.label: Access Provider
X.description: Entity providing access to receipts, APIs, schemas, or proof material.

G.label: Governance Authority
G.description: Entity appointing, certifying, or approving the verifier.

Q.label: Revocation Authority
Q.description: Entity able to terminate, revoke, or block the verifier.

P.label: Affected Party
P.description: Person affected by the automated decision.

Reg.label: Regulator or Independent Reviewer
Reg.description: External party capable of independent review.

scenario_1_operator_funded.description: Verifier is selected, funded, scoped, and renewed by the operator.

expected_conservative_result.reason: Funding, access, scope, governance, and revocation depend materially on the operator.
expected_conservative_result.ndc_effect: Apparent third-party path likely collapses to operator domain.

scenario_2_independent_funding_operator_.description: Verifier is independently funded but scope and access are controlled by the operator.

expected_conservative_result.reason: Funding is independent, but scope and access remain operator-controlled.
expected_conservative_result.ndc_effect: Some independence may exist, but substantive verification is limited by scope/access capture.

scenario_3_independent_mandate.description: Verifier is independently funded, independently scoped, and has non-operator access to proof material.

expected_conservative_result.reason: Material control vectors are outside the operator's control.
expected_conservative_result.ndc_effect: Verifier may count as a materially independent path if proof access is also independent.

scenario_4_open_tool_unfunded_exercise.description: Verification tool is open and reproducible, but no independent actor is funded to exercise it at scale.

expected_conservative_result.reason: No captured verifier is present, but exercise may be weak.
expected_conservative_result.ndc_effect: Structural path may exist, but Effective NDC may remain low under ADAP-EXP-003.
